item_name: Use gloves, gauze, and antiseptic from a first aid kit to control a minor nosebleed completion note
prompt:
A process-specific completion note documenting use of gloves, gauze, and antiseptic from a first aid kit to control a minor nosebleed. The scene focuses on a clean tabletop with disposable gloves, sterile gauze pads, antiseptic supplies, and a small care log or completion note with checkboxes and care-sequence diagrams implied without readable text. Keep the medical scene calm and non-graphic, emphasizing preparedness and proper minor first-aid procedure.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future home first-aid aesthetic: soft indoor lighting, realistic fabric, paper, and medical-plastic textures, no logos, no readable labels, no gore, and no identifiable faces. Keep the supplies neatly arranged and the note centered so the image reads as a safe, reassuring completion artifact.
